LГј Cui (Jiti) е‘ӮзІ№ (еӯЈжӮҢ)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
LГј Cui (е‘ӮзІ№), styledJiti (еӯЈжӮҢ), was born in Dongping commandery. Was Intendant of Henan. LГј Cui was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
